name: higgsfield
one_liner: Higgsfield is an AI media-generation platform (image, video, 3D, audio across 100+ models) exposing a Cloud REST API, official Python/Node SDKs, a CLI, and an MCP server for agent-driven generation.
primary_auth: API key (Bearer token; Node SDK uses API key + secret, Python SDK uses HF_KEY or HF_API_KEY/HF_API_SECRET env vars)
access_notes: Anyone can self-register at cloud.higgsfield.ai (email, Google, Apple, or Microsoft) and generate an API key from the dashboard with no approval. A free tier exists for testing (capped, e.g. ~10 concurrent generations); actual media generation consumes credits, and heavy/production use requires a paid plan, but working API credentials are obtainable without payment or approval.
api_notes: Cloud REST API centers on a small set of async generation endpoints (POST /v1/generations, GET /v1/generations/{id}, DELETE /v1/generations/{id}) but fans out across 100+ models and task types (text-to-image, image-to-video, image-to-3D, text-to-speech, music, character training). Official SDKs: Python (higgsfield-client), Node/TypeScript (higgsfield-js). A CLI (higgsfield-ai/cli) wraps job create/wait/get. Breadth is model-parameter-driven rather than many distinct endpoints.
mcp_notes: Higgsfield's own CLI/product page (higgsfield.ai/cli) advertises an official MCP server for use in Claude Code, Cursor, Cowork and other MCP-compatible agents; auth is via 'higgsfield auth login' (browser-based short-lived token, no API key needed for the MCP/CLI path). Vendor-shipped, so YES_OFFICIAL.
main_blocker: None blocking for building tools: public REST API with self-serve API keys, official SDKs, webhooks, and an official MCP server. Only practical constraint is credit consumption per generation.

evidence.claim: Higgsfield CLI runs in Claude Code/Cursor/any MCP-compatible agent, offers 30-40+ models, and authenticates via 'higgsfield auth login'; vendor advertises official MCP integration.
Cloud API uses async generation endpoints (POST/GET/DELETE /v1/generations), Bearer API-key auth, free tier for testing, webhook_url callbacks, over 100 models.
Official Python SDK 'higgsfield-client' authenticates via HF_KEY or HF_API_KEY+HF_API_SECRET environment variables.
Official Node.js/TypeScript SDK supports API key + secret authentication with configurable base URL, polling and retry.
Cloud API dashboard provides API key generation and account sign-up (cloud.higgsfield.ai).

open_questions: Whether the free tier grants enough credits to actually exercise the API without payment, or if any generation requires a paid subscription. Exact list of REST endpoints and whether the MCP server URL is publicly documented were not confirmed from primary vendor API-reference docs (some detail came from third-party guides).
